title: Extra Space Storage Offers Top-Tier Dividends
text: Extra Space Storage is one of America's largest self-storage REITs, benefiting from a strong secular trend with fading supply growth. EXR stock offers a 3.0% dividend yield and strong and consistent dividend growth.
